hero.title: Welcome to Nexus
hero.description: Your all-in-one academic portal. Access books, coworking spaces, reservations, and account management from a single place.

services.title: Our Services
services.description: Discover how Nexus can enhance your academic experience with our integrated services.

library.title: Library
library.description: Explore books, magazines, categories, and bestsellers.

coworking.title: Coworking
coworking.description: Check available spaces and make reservations.

events.title: Events
events.description: Discover talks, workshops, and activities that boost your growth and creativity.

pricing.title: Pricing
pricing.description: Discover our plans and pricing tailored to your needs.

basic.title: Basic Plan
basic.description: Ideal for students who need occasional access to academic resources.

medium.title: Academic Plan
medium.description: Perfect for active students who regularly use the library and study spaces.

premium.title: Nexus Premium Plan
premium.description: Full access to all academic resources, collaborative spaces, and exclusive benefits.

brand.description: Nexus supports the university community with digital resources and coworking spaces designed for the future.

dashboard.title: Welcome to Nexus
dashboard.subtitle: Manage your academic experience from a single place.
